features.name: assume property with clocked implication and else clause
features.description: Code should include an assume property statement with clocking event, implication operator in the property expression, and else clause with $error

features.name: nested preprocessor guards around verification statement
features.description: Code should include nested preprocessor ifdef guards around a verification statement, with guards like USE_UNR_ONLY_CONSTRAINTS and USE_FORMAL_ONLY_CONSTRAINTS
features.snippet:
`ifdef USE_UNR_ONLY_CONSTRAINTS
  `ifdef USE_FORMAL_ONLY_CONSTRAINTS
    assume property (@(posedge clock) ~enable | cond);
  `endif
`endif

features.name: labeled assertion with verif_library naming convention
features.description: Code should include a labeled assertion statement using the verif_library naming convention with double underscore separator
